StepAction: Caller invokes Endpoint::stream with body + extra_headers + compression + turn_state
Configure Method::POST + path 'responses' + Accept: text/event-stream + compression mode; delegate to session.stream_with
run_with_request_telemetry wraps execution in RetryPolicy { max_attempts, base_delay, retry_on 429/5xx/transport }; apply_auth attaches Authorization header
Transport.stream returns StreamResponse { status, headers, bytes ByteStream }; spawn_response_stream spawns process_sse task
process_sse loop: timeout(idle_timeout, stream.next()).await; eventsource-parse chunk into SSE frame; serde_json::from_str event.data into ResponsesStreamEvent

Map parsed event into ResponseEvent variant (Created/OutputItemDone/OutputTextDelta/ToolCallInputDelta/Reasoning*/RateLimits/ServerModel(dedup)/ModelVerifications/ServerReasoningIncluded); send via mpsc
Condition: event dispatched; loop back for next

StepAction: ResponseEvent::Completed { response_id, token_usage?, end_turn? } sent; process_sse returns; caller drains ResponseStream
Idle timeout exceeded (default 300s); emit ApiError::Stream("idle timeout waiting for SSE"); return
Transport / eventsource / retry-exhausted error; emit ApiError::Stream(error_message); return
